title: Accessories Mason's
description:
Bags, perfumes and gadgets by Mason's

No outfit can be considered complete without an accessory that enriches it and Mason's offers a wide choice of unisex products, which men and women can exchange. The workhorse are definitely the cotton bags with prints and applications: colorful, fun and elegant, they are very useful for those who need a capacious accessory every day or ideal for bringing the necessary for a weekend with friends or for a day at the beach.

title: Athleisure
description:
Athleisure: Sport and Elegance for Spring-Summer SS25

 

The Athleisure trend continues to redefine the concept of modern style, blending the essence of sportswear with the elegance of formal clothing. For the Spring-Summer SS25 season, Mason's celebrates this philosophy with a mini collection that combines comfort and sophistication, ideal for tackling everyday life with a touch of glamour. Lightweight, breathable fabrics paired with pastel colors softened through eco-friendly dyeing processes give every piece a contemporary and refined look.

The SS25 Athleisure Mini Collection by Mason’s

 

The Athleisure Mini Collection by Mason’s SS25 offers versatile and trendy pieces designed to meet the needs of a modern wardrobe. Key items include the City Field and Karen field jackets, perfect for transitional seasons, the Irene and Helena blazers, ideal for adding a formal touch to a casual look, and a selection of pants ranging from practical Easy Jogger and Easy Cargo to elegant Easy Straight and New York in relaxed fit. Each piece strikes a perfect balance between functionality and style, making them suitable for both leisure and more refined occasions.

 

Mason’s Athleisure: your stylish ally for a season of comfort and elegance.

title: Boston
description:
Boston Relaxed Fit Men's Mason's Spring Summer 2026

The Boston interprets the relaxed fit according to Mason's vision: comfort and proportion in balance. The softer rise and gradually tapering leg draw a modern silhouette, never excessive. In SS26 it is offered in cavalry stretch, twill and sartorial denim, where the casual fabric is brought back to a precise and contemporary construction.

%split%

Chinos, Pleats and Cargo in Relaxed Style

The collection expands the relaxed offering with models that share the same modern spirit. The relaxed chinos in oxford canvas reinterpret classicism in a softer key, while the relaxed pleats in stretch gabardine introduce depth through the front pleats. The relaxed cargo in lightweight stretch twill combines functionality with a contemporary line, maintaining comfort and structure.

%split%

Why Choose the Mason's Relaxed Fit

  • Softer yet proportioned fit
  • Comfortable rise and balanced leg
  • Versions in cavalry stretch, twill and sartorial denim
  • Chinos, pleats and cargo in relaxed style
  • Enhanced comfort without sacrificing aesthetic rigour

%split%

How Does the Relaxed Fit Wear in Mason's Men's Trousers?

The Mason's relaxed fit is not a wide, unstructured cut, but a considered silhouette designed to offer greater comfort while maintaining visual balance. The softer rise and progressively tapering leg ensure harmonious proportions. An ideal choice for those who want freedom of movement without giving up a neat and contemporary tailored construction.

title: Camouflage Men FW22
description: The camouflage part of the collection is certainly the one that most recalls the roots of Mason's and is declined in various fabrics, fits and prints combining, thanks also to the precious trendy details, the practicality of the military with a more urban look for ideal outfits for the autumn winter 2022 season. The camouflage pattern is presented in the classic cargo pants for men such as Chile and Eisenhower in cotton satin or from the combination of floral and animalier prints a unique pattern is born that recalls the camouflage and that we find for example in Chile Athleisure in gabardine. Camouflage is the essence of Mason's garments and is presented in a thousand facets: from the wadding lining of the Army Parka to the writing on the Bag Travel bags to the salpa detail on the back of the 5-pocket Harris to the print on the front of the Los Angeles coat. As always Mason's combines its roots with sartorial tradition and aesthetic taste with research and attention to detail for unique outfits.

title: Carrot fit
description:
Women's trousers, carrot fit

Mason's women's trousers express a natural balance between sartorial quality and functionality.

Performance fabrics, refined details and constant research on fits make these garments a cornerstone of the wardrobe, designed to combine comfort and aesthetics in a versatile proposal, suitable for everyday life.

%split%

The carrot fit

The carrot fit is characterized by fuller volumes on thigh and hip that narrow towards the ankle, creating a balanced and contemporary silhouette.

Mason's carrot trousers offer comfort and freedom of movement, adapting to both casual looks and work contexts, with an always refined result.

title: Carrot Fit Mason's
description:
The men's trousers, carrot fit

Mason's men's trousers are distinguished by the use of performance fabrics, breathable and durable, combined with sartorial details and advanced technical solutions.

The goal is to create functional and aesthetically refined garments, capable of naturally adapting to the different needs of the modern man.

%split%

The carrot fit

Mason's men's carrot fit trousers present a recognizable silhouette: wider and softer on thighs and hips, it narrows towards the hem, guaranteeing comfort and freedom of movement.

Ideal for refined casual looks, the carrot fit also adapts to informal work contexts, depending on pairings.

title: Chile
description:
Chile Cargo Men's Mason's Spring Summer 2026

The Chile is Mason's iconic cargo, a synthesis of utility inspiration and sartorial construction. In SS26 it comes in twill with special washing and stretch satin in extra slim fit, as well as gabardine and denim in regular fit. The offer expands with the Jogger version, with an elasticated waist in lyocell and cotton or in technical travel satin. The line is completed by the Chile Royal, cleaner in its garment-dyed finish, and the Chile M74, which draws on the historical archive with a relaxed fit.

%split%

Materials and Fits of the Chile SS26

From the lean silhouette to more balanced proportions, the Chile adapts to different needs without losing structure and identity. The Royal introduces a more essential and compact aesthetic, while the M74 reaffirms the connection to Mason's origins. The Jogger version adds comfort, maintaining stylistic coherence and calibrated construction.

%split%

Why Choose the Mason's Chile

  • Mason's iconic cargo in multiple interpretations
  • Fits in extra slim, regular and relaxed
  • Jogger variant with elasticated waist and travel fabrics
  • Royal evolution with cleaner construction
  • Historic return of the M74 with strong utility character

%split%

What Shoes to Wear with Cargo Trousers?

The cargo trousers pair with minimal sneakers, desert boots or lightweight loafers for a balanced aesthetic. The extra slim versions work best with tapered and clean footwear, while the regular models also suit more structured options. The Mason's Chile adapts naturally to both casual and more polished interpretations.

image.alt: Pantalone cargo uomo modello Chile di Mason's

title: Chile
description:
The essential cargo: the Chile

The Chile represents Mason’s cargo manifesto: it combines practicality and design in a versatile and contemporary piece that preserves the utility spirit of its side pockets, reinterpreted in an urban and refined key.

%split%

Materials, models and fits

For SS26, the women’s Chile is available in gabardine and jersey, fabrics selected to ensure structure, comfort and summer lightness. The Chile City and Chile Jogger versions embody two complementary attitudes: the first more defined and tailored, the second softer and more dynamic. Fits range from contemporary slim to relaxed, always maintaining harmonious proportions and strong character.

%split%

Why choose the Mason’s Chile

● Utility icon: cargo reinterpreted in a feminine and urban key.
● Performance fabrics: structured gabardine and comfortable jersey.
● Versatile fits: slim or relaxed for every style.
● Distinctive details: side pockets and tailored construction.
● Balance between CITY and ICON: functionality and elegance in one piece.

%split%

How to style the women’s Chile trousers?

The Chile trousers lend themselves to multiple interpretations. Paired with lightweight blazers and linen shirts, they express refined urban elegance; with t-shirts and sneakers, they enhance their utility spirit in a more casual way. Their slim or relaxed line allows you to play with volumes and proportions, creating balanced and contemporary looks for Summer 2026.

title: Chile Bermuda
description:
Chile Bermuda Cargo Men's Mason's Spring Summer 2026

The Chile is Mason's flagship cargo model, reinterpreted as a bermuda for the summer season. It retains its iconic construction with an ergonomic back seam and military-inspired pockets reworked in a clean and contemporary style. The bellows pocket is present only on the back, while the front remains flat and neat, striking a balance between functionality and minimalism. A model that encapsulates the brand's DNA, rooted in travel and Mason's South American origins.

%split%

Summer Variations of the Chile

In SS26, the Chile bermuda is presented in camouflage twill and camouflage cotton, where the print recalls the brand's utility heritage. The stretch satin version, offered in slim fit, introduces a leaner and more contemporary silhouette. From the archive returns the Chile M74 in a relaxed fit, with camouflage print, reaffirming the connection to Mason's origins in a softer and more current key.

%split%

Why Choose the Chile Bermuda Mason's

  • Mason's iconic cargo model, the flagship of the collection
  • Ergonomic back seam for enhanced comfort
  • Military pockets reimagined with a clean front and rear bellows
  • Slim fit in camouflage twill and stretch satin
  • M74 relaxed fit version from the historical archive

%split%

How to Style the Men's Cargo Bermuda, Chile Model?

The Chile bermuda pairs with essential t-shirts, polo shirts or lightweight shirts to enhance its utility character. The slim fit versions work with minimal sneakers or summer loafers, while the Chile M74 relaxed lends itself to more casual interpretations with canvas shoes or slip-ons. A model designed for a decisive yet refined summer aesthetic.

title: Chile Re_Imagined
description:
Il pantalone Cargo modello Chile rappresenta l’essenza di Mason’s. Sviluppato nel corso degli anni dal laboratorio stilistico dell’azienda, rappresenta l’evoluzione del classico pantalone cargo militare degli anni ‘70 in un nuovo concetto di pantalone.

Con il progetto Re-Imagined Chile il pantalone iconico cargo di Mason’s viene indossato da un gruppo di skater che lo ha sperimentato in uno scenario unico, sulla vetta di una cava di marmo di Carrara dove lo street artist Eduardo Kobra ha lasciato il suo segno riproducendo il David di Donatello.

Come Kobra ha RE-Immaginato il David riportandolo sul marmo da cui la statua ha avuto origine, Mason’s ha RE-Immaginato il suo pantalone più iconico, il Chile, in una nuova visione streetwear.

title: City Suit
description:
City Suit SS25 by Mason's: Practicality for Summer

The City Suit line by Mason's for the Spring-Summer 2025 collection is designed for women who seek to combine elegance and practicality for every occasion. This collection stands out for its feminine pants models like the New York Carrot and Milano, which, thanks to lightweight and breathable fabrics, offer an impeccable fit, ideal for warmer days. The use of materials such as twill and jersey ensures a feeling of comfort without sacrificing style. Every piece in the line is crafted with careful details such as fine stitching and elegant finishes to enhance the feminine silhouette and add a touch of sophistication.

Comfort and Style for Every Moment of the Day

The collection also includes versatile models like the Easy Straight pants, designed to adapt to various situations. The New York Cozy Straight and New York Straight pants, featuring unique details, are perfect for effortlessly transitioning from a formal engagement to a more relaxed one. For a bolder look, the Victoria New pants offer a sophisticated and impactful alternative. The pieces in Mason's City Suit line for the SS25 collection not only emphasize femininity but also ensure comfort and functionality to face every moment of the day in style.

 

The Spring-Summer 2025 collection by Mason's is an invitation to explore the city with elegance and confidence, thanks to thoughtfully designed models crafted from high-quality fabrics.

title: Dallas
description:
Dallas: the women’s cargo redefining workwear

The Dallas women’s model reinterprets workwear with a contemporary perspective, where functionality and style come together naturally. Inspired by industrial aesthetics, it features iconic details such as the carpenter pocket and the hammer loop pocket, distinctive yet never overpowering. A piece designed for everyday wear. A women’s cargo pant combining character, practicality and style.

%split%

Two interpretations, one identity: Dallas pants and bermuda

The Dallas line comes in two versions: the Dallas wide, a long straight fit pant, and the Dallas bermuda with a relaxed fit, softer and more effortless. Both are made from slub cotton, a fabric with an irregular texture that adds depth and movement. The result is a lightweight, breathable and naturally textured material. Perfect for the summer season.

%split%

Why choose Dallas by Mason’s

● Contemporary women’s workwear aesthetic
● Iconic functional details
● Slub cotton, lightweight and textured
● Versatile fits: straight fit and relaxed fit
● Ideal for casual and urban looks

%split%

What body types suit cargo pants?

Women’s cargo pants like Dallas adapt easily to different body shapes. Relaxed fit styles provide comfort and fluidity, while the straight fit balances and elongates the silhouette. Side pockets add volume, enhancing more linear body types. A versatile piece designed to express style naturally.

title: Easy
description:
The Easy model: simplicity that becomes style

Easy is Mason’s answer to everyday essentiality. Created to combine simplicity and refinement, it translates the comfort of jersey into clean, modern lines suited to urban life and leisure, without compromising the brand’s tailored identity.

%split%

Fits, models and materials: tactile comfort and fluid lines

The Easy model is available in Easy straight, Easy kick and Easy jogger versions, each designed to interpret comfort through different proportions. Fits range from clean straight lines to slightly flared silhouettes and the more relaxed jogger style. Materials include sweatshirt fabric, jersey and lurex, selected for softness, stretch and a contemporary hand feel that enhances the garment’s structure.

%split%

Why choose the Mason’s Easy model

● Evolved comfort combining softness and tailored construction
● Essential lines and contemporary design
● Straight, kick and jogger versions for different style needs
● Fabrics such as sweatshirt, jersey and lurex for relaxed elegance
● Urban versatility suited to everyday wear

%split%

What makes the Easy model unique?

What makes Easy unique is its ability to transform an apparently simple piece into a distinctive proposal. The balance between soft materials and precise construction maintains a defined silhouette without sacrificing comfort. Mason’s Easy embodies a conscious minimalism, where every detail contributes to a refined and contemporary urban style.

title: Essential
description:
Mason's presents its must-have pieces for Spring Summer 2024, essentials every consumer needs in their wardrobe to meet all the demands of their routine. The cargo in regular modal Airfield model made of cotton and twill offers a soft fit and is ideal for those who prioritize comfort. The Chile Altheisure cargo in carrot fit, available in both long and Bermuda versions, embodies Mason’s DNA while also being highly trendy due to the combination of a slim fit, military details, and the camouflage that defines the Bermuda.

The men's Capri model chino Bermuda Khinos Summer in parachute fabric with a regular fit, are the summer's go-to: wearable day and night, with a shirt, they are indispensable and you will always look perfect. Lastly, you can indulge in lightweight polos with tailoring details, ideal for eccentric and personalized summer outfits

title: Essential Woman
description:
Everyday Style with Essential - For Every Moment of the Day

 

The Essential line was created with the urban daily life in mind: perfect for the office, commuting, and all commitments. This line offers versatile garments that accompany you from morning to evening, adapting to every occasion with a simple change of accessories. Imagine wearing an elegant blazer or a shirt in the Casta, Adele, or Florida style, and completing the look with a military jacket. The collection includes classic chinos in various versions: New York, New York Slim, Jacqueline Capri, available in slim, regular, and curvy fits. The fabrics range from lightweight tencel to elegant stretch satin, offering a range of prints from classic tone-on-tone camouflage to florals and micro-patterns.

 

New Additions to the Essential Collection

 

Expanding the variety, the Essential line now includes the chino pants New York Flare, New York Trumpet, NY Wide Pinces, New York Straight, New York Cropped, and New York Cozy Straight. Casual options like the Portofino chino jogger pants model Linda Summer and the Malibu Jogger are also available. For a bolder touch, discover the cargo pants models Victoria, Evita, Chile City, and Asia Snake, combining style and practicality.

 

 

The Essential line is the ideal choice for tackling everyday city life with style and versatility. With a wide range of garments and fabrics, this line will accompany you from morning to evening, easily adapting to every occasion.

title: Extra Slim Fit
description:
The men's trousers, extra slim fit

Mason's men's trousers stem from continuous research into performance, breathable and durable fabrics, enriched by sartorial details and advanced technical solutions.

A proposal designed to combine contemporary style, functionality and construction quality, to accompany the modern man throughout every moment of the day.

%split%

The extra slim fit

Mason's extra slim fit is dedicated to those seeking a modern and defined silhouette. The slim and tapered line follows the body with precision, enhancing the male figure with balance and elegance.

The fitted cut on thigh and leg creates a clean aesthetic, ideal for formal and professional contexts, but also adaptable to casual looks for leisure time.

title: Fuori Mare
description:
Fuori Mare: the charm of summer according to Mason's SS25

 

Immerse yourself in the essence of summer style with Mason’s new Fuori Mare collection, designed for the Spring-Summer SS25 season. This line embodies the perfect balance between practicality and sophistication, celebrating the freedom and energy of a summer spent outdoors, enjoying moments of relaxation and fun with friends. Fuori Mare SS25 combines creative design and high-quality materials, offering garments that tell the story of a season filled with unforgettable experiences.

The highlights of the collection: Shirts and Chino Pants

 

At the heart of the collection are the short- and long-sleeve shirts, such as the Florida and Lauren models, and the Portofino chino pants. The shirts, crafted from lightweight poplin, stand out for their modern cuts and fresh patterns, making them perfect for adding character to any summer outfit. The chino pants, on the other hand, combine a relaxed design with elegant details, offering comfort and style in a range of colors that reflect the vibrancy of summer. Perfect for a sunset aperitif or a stroll along the coast, these pieces are the epitome of laid-back elegance.

 

Fuori Mare SS25 is an invitation to embrace summer with authenticity and color. Each piece is designed to highlight the personality of the wearer and ensure maximum comfort, turning every summer day into a special moment. Discover the joy of wearing Mason’s and let yourself be inspired by the unique atmosphere of the SS25 season.

title: FUORIMARE
description:
FUORIMARE: Style And Comfort with Mason's

 

Discover the quintessence of summer style with the FUORIMARE line. Designed for the Spring Summer 2024 season, this line is a true manifesto of the personality, practicality of the Mason's brand. It's a collection that combines style and comfort, perfect for the man who wants to stand out during aperitifs with friends in a seaside venue. The FUORIMARE line is characterized by a unique fusion of refinement and quality, creating garments that embody the idea of a special summer.

 

Shirts and Bermuda Shorts: The Essence of the Line

 

At the heart of the line, we find Mason's shirts, represented by the Porto and Torino models, the chino trousers model Taormina, and the cargo model Forte. Both shirts with their linen fabrics and long sleeves offer a comfortable fit and bold looks. On the other hand, the Taormina bermuda shorts, presented in a chino cut, with a regular fit and white camouflage print, and in a parachute fabric version without the print, ensure comfort and express a perfect balance between freshness and carefreeness. The Forte cargo bermuda shorts, in the regular rip stop version and parachute fabric, are a baggy short, meaning without button opening, making them extremely refined and suitable for an aperitif in a seaside venue with friends, maintaining that extra touch of class. These practical and comfortable pieces are ideal for making your summer outfit chicer.

 

The FUORIMARE line is an invitation to live summer with passion and style. Each piece is designed to enhance personality and ensure comfort, allowing those who wear them to fully enjoy every moment of the summer season. Join us on this journey of freshness and color in Spring Summer 2024.

title: FW25 Mason's Men
description:
Mason's Men's FW25 Collection: functional tailoring

The Fall Winter 2025 Men's Mason's collection presents a structured wardrobe that combines premium materials, evolved fits and distinctive style. Designed to accompany the cold season, FW25 offers trousers, blazers and outerwear that blend sartorial elegance with contemporary functionality, creating a balance between comfort, performance and aesthetic refinement.

%split%

Performance materials and sartorial details

FW25 stems from advanced textile research that enhances premium blends of wool, silk, cashmere and cotton, designed to offer warmth, lightness and breathability. Ribbed corduroy, moleskin and stretch gabardine enrich the winter proposal, while garment dyeing intensifies chromatic depth. Active 4.0 jersey adds a technical component ideal for dynamic rhythms.

%split%

Iconic models and versatile fits

The iconic models of FW25 — Milano, Chile, Torino, New York and Osaka — are offered in slim, extra slim, regular and carrot fits to suit different needs. Alongside these, the relaxed fit establishes itself with soft lines and freedom of movement. Boston, Chinos and Pinces reinterpret this style with premium materials and sartorial construction.

%split%

Functional elegance between jackets and blazers

FW25 offers a selection of jackets and blazers designed for city, work and travel. The M74 field jacket, also available in camouflage version, and the Firenze overshirt in wool combine warmth, practicality and sartorial care. The blazers complete the offering with performance solutions that guarantee comfort, technique and impeccable lines for modern and versatile elegance.

%split%

Why choose the Mason's Men's FW25 collection

Wide variety of trousers for every silhouette

Technical and natural fabrics designed for winter

Calibrated fits between tailored and casual

Versatile, performance-driven and distinctive outerwear and blazers

%split%

What should a man wear in autumn?

To face winter with style and balance, it's essential to choose garments that offer warmth, durability and personality. Mason's trousers in wool, stretch gabardine or technical jersey guarantee thermal protection and impeccable fit. Paired with travel blazers, wool overshirts or jackets like the M74 field jacket, they allow dynamic and sophisticated looks, ideal for every moment of the cold season.

title: FW25 Mason's Woman
description:
Mason's Women's Collection FW25: functional elegance

The Autumn Winter 2025 Women's Mason's collection proposes an essential yet distinctive wardrobe that evolves the brand's DNA while maintaining femininity, practicality and design. Designed for everyday and transversal use, it combines modern fits and warm materials, with a focus on trousers, jackets and enveloping textures, to stylishly accompany every moment of the winter season.

%split%

Premium fabrics and recurring materials

The refined blends of cashmere, wool and cotton guarantee warmth, softness and breathability, while gabardine, corduroy and satin reinterpret iconic models such as New York in a contemporary key. A selection of materials that combines tradition and innovation, designed to offer comfort and elegance throughout the cold season.

%split%

Garment dyeing: artisanal nuances

The artisanal process of garment dyeing gives each garment unique nuances, creating a lived-in effect that enhances the personality and sartorial care typical of Mason's. The slight tone variations represent the signature of the brand's artisanal quality, making each creation distinctive, authentic and unrepeatable.

%split%

Wide fits and modern silhouettes

FW25 enhances wide leg and straight fits, protagonists of the contemporary women's wardrobe. Wide and flowing lines guarantee comfort, movement and breathability. The proposal is completed by slim and carrot fits, for a versatile selection capable of adapting to different silhouettes and occasions, combining stylistic research and sartorial tradition.

%split%

Why choose the Mason's Women's collection FW25

Materials selected for winter climate

Evolved fits designed for every body type

Elegant palette with unique chromatic accents

Garments designed for work, travel and leisure

%split%

What to wear when it's cold?

Facing the cold with style means choosing garments that combine warmth, fit and functionality. Mason's trousers in wool, cashmere or corduroy offer thermal protection without sacrificing elegance. To complete the look, pair them with panama or wool jackets, structured jersey blazers or flowing viscose shirts, creating versatile and refined outfits for the entire season.

title: George & John
description:
The men's trousers from Mason's logo edition

The George Coolpocket and John Coolkhinos models express Mason's ability to merge functionality and sartorial aesthetics. Two contemporary interpretations of men's trousers, designed for those seeking a decisive yet balanced style.

%split%

Carrot fit and distinctive details

Made in high-quality gabardine and distinguished by the Logo Edition patch, these trousers feature a carrot fit, wider on the thigh and tapered at the hem. A construction designed to guarantee comfort, freedom of movement and a modern line.

%split%

John Coolkhinos: the sartorial chino

The John Coolkhinos is the men's chino that combines practicality and refinement. Equipped with welt back pockets, ergonomic stitching and Logo Edition patch, it adapts naturally to elegant looks with shirt and blazer or more casual with polo and technical jacket.

%split%

George Coolpocket: the contemporary cargo

The George Coolpocket reinterprets cargo in a modern key. The functional cargo pockets coexist with welt back pockets and Logo Edition patch, creating a balance between urban spirit and sartorial care. A model designed for dynamic but always refined outfits.

%split%

Why choose George & John Mason's models

Logo Edition line with round velcro patch

Carrot fit, comfortable and current

Made in premium gabardine

Two complementary interpretations: elegant chino and functional cargo

%split%

Which are the most contemporary men's trousers in the Mason's collection?

The George Coolpocket and John Coolkhinos models represent the most modern soul of the Mason's collection. In quality gabardine and with distinctive details such as the round velcro patch, they combine the brand's sartorial language with a contemporary and urban sensibility.

title: Icon Camou
description:
Mason's Icon Camou SS25 Collection: Military Style with Contemporary Sophistication

The Icon Camou line from Mason's for Spring Summer 2025 reinterprets the classic camouflage with a selection of distinctive garments and premium fabrics. From the satin cargo trousers, like the Chile City model, to the Santa Barbara jacket in twill with studs, each item expresses character and versatility. The color palette and sophisticated finishes make this line perfect for those looking for a contemporary look without sacrificing the essence of military style.

Comfort and Refined Design for Every Occasion

With relaxed and curvy fits, the models from the Icon Camou line combine practicality and elegance. The Judy Bermuda in cotton twill with camouflage print, paired with the Dehli long-sleeve shirt in muslin, are designed to suit any occasion, from an urban look to casual chic. Each item is finished with unique details, adding a touch of innovation and edge to the summer wardrobe.

The Icon Camou line is the perfect emblem of design innovation, blending military tradition with modern trends.

title: Icon flower
description:
Icon Flower Summer Collection by Mason's

The Icon Flower line by Mason's for Spring Summer 2025 celebrates the freshness and vibrancy of summer with a collection full of floral details and light fabrics. The pieces in this line combine elegance and comfort, with patterns inspired by nature, perfect for those who want a summer wardrobe that conveys joy and personality.

Among the most iconic models is the Jaqueline Curvie, available in a bermuda version, which stands out for its floral pattern and curvy fit, enhancing the figure with style. The Adele MM and Delhi shirts, made of viscose and muslin respectively, are enriched with floral prints and offer versatile options, available in solid colors or coordinated prints, ideal for creating fresh and chic combinations.

 

Elegance and Versatility in Every Detail

For a casual yet refined look, the chino bermuda New York Cozy is a perfect choice, featuring a subtle floral print and a regular fit that adapts to any context. The cargo pants Chile City and chino Linda Summer are also ideal additions to the summer wardrobe. The Colette Dress in poplin with a wildflower print adds a romantic touch, ideal for summer evenings and informal events. These pieces are designed to enhance femininity, offering lightness and a unique style.

 

With the Icon Flower collection by Mason’s, discover a summer filled with elegance, lightness, and imagination, for a style that stands out.

title: Icon Luxury
description:
The Icon Luxury Women's Collection: A Tribute to the Past, a Contemporary Look

 

 

The Icon Luxury Women's Collection by Mason's celebrates the past with a new vision of our iconic historical archive. These trousers represent an elegant reinterpretation of historical designs, blending the timeless functionality of military-inspired design with the highest-quality fabrics and modern lines. Each piece tells a story of elegance and style, where tradition and innovation meet to create trousers with a distinctive character, designed for a woman who appreciates a sophisticated and versatile look.

 

These trousers, featuring military-inspired details such as "fatigue" and "work" pockets, are made from luxurious fabrics like cotton-linen, ensuring lightness and breathability—perfect for tackling any occasion with style and comfort. The fit, modern and adjustable, reflects a careful and contemporary reinterpretation, designed to meet the needs of today's woman, who refuses to compromise on either comfort or refinement.

 

Every element of the collection references military aesthetics, but with an elegant twist that makes these trousers a must-have for every season. A timeless classic that reinvents itself while maintaining its historical identity.


 Designed for a woman who wants to explore new stylistic possibilities without ever losing the charm of tradition, the trousers from the Icon Luxury Women's Collection are a tribute to the past, combining historic design with the modernity of materials and finishes.

title: ICON WASHING
description:
Icon Washing: The Perfect Union of Style and Sustainability


The Icon Washing line by Mason’s for Spring-Summer 2025 represents a perfect balance between contemporary aesthetics and environmental awareness. This collection is characterized by a marbled treatment, a technique similar to tie-dye but more delicate, which gives the garments a matte and sophisticated finish. This exclusive processing is applied both to hybrid and casual styles, such as joggers, and to more classic pieces suitable for formal settings.


A Renewed Look for the Classics


In the Icon Washing collection, the Chile 1 cargo pants present themselves in an entirely new form. With their extra-slim fit and marbled treatment, they offer a modern and sustainable version of traditional cargo pants. Available in current shades such as navy, light blue, and khaki, these pants are perfect for those who desire a unique style without compromising sustainability. The Milano Style Essential chinos also embody conscious fashion, combining elegance and ecological commitment, with a distinctive style that makes them a staple of the collection.


The Icon Washing line by Mason's is a demonstration of how design and respect for the environment can coexist. Each piece is a tribute to Mason's commitment to creating fashion that is not only aesthetically appealing but also conscious and respectful of the environment.

title: Icon Washing Women
description:
Innovation and Style in Mason’s Icon Washing Line

The Icon Washing line by Mason's for Spring Summer 2025 strikes the perfect balance between innovation and comfort, designed for the modern woman seeking versatile and distinctive garments. Among the highlights of the collection is the Jaqueline Archivio chino pant in gabardine with a curvy fit, standing out for its ice colour and artisanal treatment that gives it a unique and lived-in texture. The Judy Archivio cargo pant in cotton twill offers a more casual and relaxed alternative, enriched with pastel shades that evoke the summer season.

Artisanal Masterpieces and Impeccable Fit

Every piece in the line is designed to enhance the silhouette while ensuring maximum comfort. The Chile City cargo pant, made of gabardine, stands out for its curvy fit and city-chic look, perfect for any occasion, while the Victoria cargo pant in gabardine with a straight fit is the ideal piece to complete any outfit. Each model undergoes the Icon Washing process, adding personality to the garments with a delicate vintage effect and a natural elegance.

Mason’s Icon Washing: Authentic Style and Timeless Sophistication

The Icon Washing line by Mason’s SS25 stands out for its artisanal washing treatments that give the fabrics unique softness and depth of colour. From the Jaqueline Archivio chino to the Victoria cargo pant, each piece is designed for those seeking an authentic and uncompromising style. With refined details and high-quality materials, these models perfectly adapt to casual and elegant settings, always carrying Mason’s distinctive signature.

title: Iconic Uniform
description: Iconic Uniform is the soft-military mood of Mason's: the colors of the camouflage fade from khaki to military green and the textures are those of tencel, viscose and satin, extremely fresh and latest generation fabrics. The super-soft shirts and tunics are decorated with studs and jewel patches with an animalier theme. The field jackets are short and very elegant and feature animal mix and camouflage patterns and are embellished with rhinestone patches. The trousers are presented in relaxed fit and impalpable fabrics and are decorated with studs or feature very light camouflage prints. The part of the Iconic Uniform collection is perfect for those who love the rigor and elegance of a contemporary military uniform.

title: Jaqueline Shorts
description:
Women's Chino Bermuda Shorts from the Spring Summer 2025 Collection

The chino bermuda shorts for women by Mason's continue to be a must-have in women's fashion. This season, the Jaqueline bermuda shorts are presented in a modern and vibrant interpretation, perfect for any occasion. Characterized by a sophisticated design and a palette of fresh colors, these pieces combine elegance and practicality, making them essential for the summer wardrobe.

Made from soft and breathable fabrics like cotton and twill and originally inspired by military attire, these models are reinterpreted in a modern and urban style, maintaining practical elements like pockets and zippers to hold the essentials.

 

Women's Chino Bermuda Shorts, Jaqueline Model

The highlight piece of the SS25 collection is the Jaqueline: sleek and minimalist, ideal for urban settings and moments of relaxation. With a curvy fit that enhances feminine curves, these bermuda shorts are an essential piece that embodies the Mason's collection icon. The original military structure is reimagined with fresh colors and fashionable details, such as the geometric print, offering a summer vibe that is both trendy and stylish.

The Jaqueline bermuda shorts can be paired with a solid-colored or printed blouse for an elegant and sophisticated look, or with a lightweight jacket for a bolder touch. For a casual and lively outfit, a patterned t-shirt will perfectly complete the look.

Discover the iconic Mason’s model now!

title: Jersey & Wool
description:
Jersey is a fabric borrowed from the world of sportswear that is increasingly used for urban garments, while wool is a warm and comfortable fabric, indispensable in the cold season. These fabrics have a light but at the same time resistant texture that gives a contemporary look. The Jersey & Wool line represents the evolution of our wardrobe towards a new concept of dressing, focused on naturalness and well-being and is declined in the iconic Chile Athleisure cargo made in both fabrics, or in the New Verga and Tech Jacket blazers. Mason's also presents hybrid models jogger trousers such as the Milano, present in both wool and jersey, or the Torino Jog, suitable for a demanding consumer who is always attentive to the latest fashion trends. In full winter style are the Los Angeles and Alain wool coats or the Soho Hybrid technical jacket with wool sleeves.

These fabrics will keep you warm in the autumn winter 2022 season while giving a trendy look thanks to fits, details and colors designed for the cold season.

title: Jersey golf
description:
Mason's Jersey Golf Line: Elegance and Comfort for Spring-Summer 2025

For the Spring-Summer 2025 season, Mason's launches the Jersey Golf line, a collection of men's pants, bermuda shorts, and overshirts made from jersey, perfect for those seeking a balance between urban elegance and sports functionality. The pants in the collection represent a sartorial innovation, combining formal style with the practicality of technical apparel.

Among the standout models are the Chile Golf, Torino Jog, Torino Golf, and Torino City String, designed to meet the needs of a dynamic lifestyle, between formal appointments and leisure moments. The Da Vinci blazer in jersey, featuring a gradient plaid pattern and in refined dark blue, is ideal for the early spring days, offering a versatile and sophisticated option. The bermuda, such as the Torino Jog 1, New York Golf 1 Pinces, and Chile Golf, stand out for their comfortable and practical design.

Details and Versatility of the Jersey Golf Line

The Jersey Golf line is distinguished by the use of jersey fabrics in neutral and refined tones, creating a look that oscillates between sophisticated elegance and the practicality of comfortable apparel. Iconic pieces like the Torino pants, the New York, the Chile, and the Da Vinci Blazer have been reimagined in the Golf version, enhanced with sporty details such as drawstrings and stretch ribbons, combined with sartorial finishes like satin ribbons and topstitching.

This year, the line is enhanced with the Williams overshirts in fresh white and Steve in navy blue, ideal for spring evenings. These versatile pieces can be worn in everyday life, whether for formal engagements, a relaxing weekend, or a game of golf.

Refresh your Spring-Summer 2025 wardrobe with the style and comfort of Mason’s Jersey Golf line, a collection designed for those who desire versatile clothing without sacrificing elegance.

title: Judy Archivio
description:
The Women’s Cargo Pants, Judy Archivio Model

The women’s cargo pants Judy Archivio from the SS25 collection embodies the charm of military style reimagined with feminine and modern details. Crafted from lightweight twill, this model combines the quality of cotton with a relaxed fit, making it a comfortable and versatile piece, perfect for tackling the warm season in style.

The SS25 collection offers it in a varied palette of colors ranging from ice blue to sage green, adding a touch of sophistication and brightness. The materials and treatments used ensure comfort and lightness, providing freshness even on the hottest days.

Mason’s and the Women’s Cargo Pants: The Judy Archivio

Mason’s stands out for its ability to reinterpret the cargo pants with a sophisticated and contemporary aesthetic, blending tradition and modernity. The Judy Archivio fully reflects this philosophy: inspired by a heritage look, but updated with a soft and wide cut that fits the silhouette without restrictions. Its iconic finish makes it ideal for women with a bold style who pay attention to detail and appreciate versatile pieces that adapt to both casual and formal settings.

How to Style the Women’s Cargo Pants, Judy Archivio

For an urban and trendy look, the Judy Archivio can be paired with elegant shirts or lightweight jackets from the same collection. Its multiple variations allow for experimenting with different combinations, creating outfits that range from casual to sophisticated. Pair it with a field jacket for a casual-chic style or with an elegant blouse for an informal occasion. The Judy Archivio represents the perfect mix of style and comfort, a must-have item in your summer wardrobe.

title: Linen Party
description:
The Natural Essence of Mason's Linen Party SS25 Collection for Women

The new Linen Party line from Mason's for Spring Summer 2025 celebrates the elegance of natural fabrics. Linen, loved for its freshness and lightness, remains the absolute protagonist, perfect for tackling the hottest days with a refined and effortless style. This is complemented by the use of ramie, a natural fiber that adds sturdiness and a refined texture to the garments, while still keeping a fresh and sophisticated touch. Iconic models like the Colette Dress in linen with a floral print and the New York Cozy trousers with woven details stand out for their versatility and femininity. The Delhi shirt completes the collection with a style that blends modern details and elegant prints.

Versatile Design for a Summer of Elegance and Comfort

Mason's has created the SS25 collection with versatility and comfort in mind, essential elements for the modern woman. The Linen Party line includes pieces like the Real Field overshirt and the New York Straight trousers, designed to offer a relaxed yet impeccable fit. Models such as the Colette Dress with floral print and the Delhi enriched with sophisticated details, are available both in solid colours and with exclusive patterns. These pieces feature carefully crafted details, such as mother-of-pearl buttons and contrast stitching, to add a touch of refinement to any occasion. From casual looks for leisure to more structured outfits for the city, the Linen Party collection is the perfect choice to experience the summer with style and practicality.

title: Logo Edition
description:
The Pieces of the Logo Edition Line: Men's Pants, Polos, T-Shirts, Sweatshirts, and Jackets

 

The Logo Edition line signifies that special part of the men's collection that is presented in a limited edition. The pieces that are part of this capsule are original items from the historical archive, revisited and updated in fit and details and characterized by the “stamp”, that is, a detachable velcro patch that conceals the Mason’s logo. The intention is to create items with a 100% Mason’s DNA but extremely sophisticated from the point of view of the fabrics and technologies used.

 

The Logo Edition line is a true essential and complete wardrobe indeed within it we find both men's pants, bermuda shorts, polos, and outerwear such as jackets, t-shirts, and field jackets. As for the pants, most are cargo and jogger with relaxed and carrot fits both in cotton and in next-generation fabrics like nylon, ripstop, and jersey.

The London is Mason's chino bermuda in a regular fit, designed to offer a balance between comfort and proportion. It derives from the classic chino trouser, retaining its clean lines and neat construction in a summer length. The defining feature of the model is its wide range of available colours, spanning from natural shades to brighter, distinctly summery tones.

%split%

Gabardine and Colour as the Stars

Crafted in gabardine, the London delivers a lightweight structure, durability and breathability, making it ideal for the warm season. The compactness of the fabric enhances chromatic depth, bringing out both neutral shades and more vibrant hues. A model designed for those seeking an essential bermuda distinguished by the power of colour.

Why Choose the London Mason's

  • Balanced and versatile chino bermuda in regular fit
  • Wide colour palette, from natural shades to summery tones

Bermuda Jogger Men's Mason's Spring Summer 2026

title: Man Summer Blazer
description:
Men's Blazers Mason's Spring Summer 2026

The men's blazers Spring Summer 2026 collection revolves around the iconic Da Vinci model, reinterpreted for summer with a balance between structure and lightness. Offered in super technical jersey and technical sateen from the Travel line, it combines elegance with dynamic comfort.

Lightweight structure and functional soul

The men's fashion trends for summer 2026 favour lightness, versatility and evolved materials. Blazers are becoming lighter in construction and are offered in technical Travel jersey, linen and natural cotton, combining functionality and elegance. title: Man Summer Cargo Pants
description:
Men's Cargo Trousers Mason's Spring Summer 2026

The cargo trouser is an integral part of the Mason's DNA. Born from a functional aesthetic inspired by the military world, it is distinguished by its applied pockets, structured construction and a strong character. In the Men's Cargo Trousers Mason's SS26 collection, this iconic model evolves with contemporary proportions and a cleaner reading, keeping its utility soul intact while gaining a new and more essential refinement.

%split%

Chile: the icon evolves

The Chile, the brand's cargo par excellence, is reinterpreted with a broader range of options. Alongside the historic extra slim fit, a regular fit version and a jogger with elasticated waist variant make their debut, designed for more dynamic comfort. The season also introduces the Chile in regular denim, expanding the range with a more textured proposal that remains fully consistent with the Mason's identity.

%split%

Royal and M74 archive: contemporaneity and heritage

In SS26, Chile and George become Royal: piece dyeing, cleaner stitching and a more linear appearance define a more mature and refined aesthetic. In parallel, iconic archive models return, including the Cuba Work M74, the Dallas M74 and the Chile M74, offered in a relaxed fit, in line with the new proportions of the season.

%split%

Fabrics and materials

The collection is developed in cotton, sateen, bull and slubbed panama, fabrics capable of ensuring structure while remaining lightweight in the warm months. The Travel line introduces technical comfort and controlled stretch, with a natural and sophisticated hand. Every material is chosen to maintain a balance between function, chromatic depth and summer refinement.

%split%

Why choose Mason's cargo trousers

  • The Chile, an iconic model reinterpreted in regular, jogger and denim versions
  • The Royal line with cleaner construction and distinctive piece dyeing
  • The return of M74 relaxed fit models from the historic archive
  • Extra slim, regular, carrot and relaxed fits for different needs
  • Structured summer fabrics and the high-performing Travel line

What body type suits cargo trousers?

Cargo trousers suit a variety of body types thanks to the range of fits available. Extra slim fit versions define a leaner silhouette, while regular and carrot fit balance proportions on medium builds. Relaxed fit variants sit harmoniously on more athletic frames, offering greater volume on the thigh and leg. In the Mason's SS26 collection, every model combines utility character with aesthetic balance.

title: Man Summer Chino Pants
description:
Men's Chino Trousers Mason's Spring Summer 2026

The Men's Chino Trousers Mason's Spring Summer 2026 collection reinterprets its identity through summer fabrics, contemporary proportions and a calibrated tailored construction.

The techniques of yarn dyeing, piece dyeing and garment dyeing enhance the depth and naturalness of the colour, while the Terre del Mare line evokes luminous, material-rich Mediterranean tones.

title: Man Winter Coats

The Harris Model Man Jeans: Features

 

The Harris Man's jeans by Mason's is a unique denim, embodying double characteristics: it is gritty yet finely tailored, abundant in exquisite details but with a stone washed finish that recalls its origins. The real revolution lies in the proportion of memory elastane built into the men's jeans, which not only sustains the garment's fit even after extensive use but also guarantees extraordinary comfort. 

 

Luxury Details and Customization

 

The Harris Men's 5-pocket jeans come in three shades of blue and are completed by luxurious accessories and fine details. A silk handkerchief in the same pattern as the label and leg interior, the enameled button and rivets, and the rivet featuring Mason's M logo, all add a touch of luxury and uniqueness to every pair of jeans.

 

Pairings and style for the Fall Winter 2023 Collection

 

Mason's aim is to provide a pair of elegant, personalized jeans that are the result of meticulous design, and that can be paired with the rest of the Fall-Winter 2023 Collection. With Mason's men's jeans, you can create versatile and refined outfits, perfect for any occasion.

 

Explore the Fall-Winter 2023 Collection and live every day with style and comfort.

title: Man Winter Jackets
description:
Mason's Men's Jackets FW25

The men's jackets FW25 Mason's collection stems from the encounter between military heritage, textile innovation and urban functionality. Designed to face winter with protection and character, Mason's jackets combine iconic lines, performance materials and sartorial details, defining a versatile, structured wardrobe suitable for every moment of the cold season.

%split%

Fabrics and materials: warmth and durability

FW25 jackets use selected fabrics to guarantee thermal comfort and durability. From stretch cotton to technical satin, through to corduroy and wool, each garment is designed to offer protection without sacrificing style. Artisanal treatments enhance the textures, making each jacket unique and recognizable in the Mason's tradition.

%split%

Iconic models: the jackets of the collection

The heart of the proposal is the M74 Field Jacket, made in stretch cotton or satin with warm lining, symbol of Mason's heritage aesthetic. The M74 Work Jacket evolves the utility inspiration in a more functional version, while the Space Field Jacket in corduroy introduces a refined and rich texture, perfect for looks with decisive character.

Overshirts and outerwear: Firenze and Los Angeles

The Firenze overshirt, offered in wide-rib corduroy or wool, interprets casual style with a sartorial reading ideal between shirt and jacket. The Los Angeles coat, in wool cloth with Prince of Wales print, completes the collection with an elegant and wintry aesthetic. Different models that express functionality, structure and personality.

%split%

Why choose a Mason's jacket

Warm and performance fabrics: stretch cotton, satin, corduroy and wool

Synthesis of heritage aesthetic and urban functionality

Sartorial details that guarantee comfort and personality

Versatility of use: from work to leisure

%split%

Which jacket to wear in winter?

In the Mason's FW25 collection, the warmest models include the M74 Field Jacket with quilted lining, the Space Field Jacket in corduroy and the Los Angeles coat in wool cloth. Winter fabrics and sartorial details define protective and elegant garments, perfect for facing the cold season with style.

title: Man Winter Overshirt
description:
Mason's Men's Overshirts FW25

The Mason's men's overshirts FW25 are the shirt jacket par excellence: a hybrid garment that combines the lightness of a shirt with the structure of a jacket. A cornerstone of Mason's DNA, they interpret winter with Italian tailoring, refined materials and urban versatility, becoming an essential element of the male wardrobe.

%split%

Fabrics and materials: warmth and textile research

The FW25 collection explores warm and premium fabrics developed in collaboration with Italian textile companies. The 500-rib corduroy, soft and three-dimensional, enhances the depth of texture, while compact wool ensures protection and structure. Each material is selected to offer thermal comfort, durability and authentic elegance, in full continuity with Mason's tradition.

%split%

Iconic models: Steve and Firenze

The Steve model, made in 500-rib corduroy, represents the most sophisticated interpretation of the overshirt. Designed to accompany the cold season, it lends itself to both casual looks and more refined combinations, proving ideal as an intermediate layer under coats or more structured jackets.

%split%

The Firenze variants: between casual and sartorial

The Firenze overshirt, offered in both corduroy and wool, expresses Mason's dual soul: relaxed yet with sartorial details that make it suitable even for more elegant contexts. Thanks to its balanced construction, it's a versatile garment that fits easily into the winter wardrobe, adapting to different needs with naturalness and style.

%split%

Why choose a Mason's overshirt

Exclusive fabrics such as 500-rib corduroy and compact wool

Transversal garment: halfway between jacket and shirt

Synthesis of textile innovation and Italian tailoring

Refined details for everyday and functional elegance

%split%

What is meant by overshirt?

An overshirt is a shirt jacket that combines the practicality of a shirt with the structure of a lightweight jacket. In Mason's vision it becomes a versatile and sartorial garment, perfect for casual or formal looks, and represents a pillar of the winter wardrobe thanks to its functionality and distinctive character.

title: Man Winter Pants
description:
Mason's Men's Trousers Fall Winter 2025

The men's trouser collection Fall Winter 2025 interprets the cold season with garments designed to guarantee comfort, versatility and sartorial style. Conceived to accompany the contemporary man in every context, FW25 trousers combine technical and refined solutions, premium materials and construction designed to last. A proposal that evolves with continuity, maintaining a balance between innovation and functional elegance.

%split%

Fabrics and innovations: comfort, structure and performance

FW25 stands out for its advanced material research, with fabrics designed for warmth, breathability and durability. Active 4.0 jersey ensures high performance, while stretch gabardine promotes natural movements and comfort. Premium fibers in wool blends, cashmere or silk and wide-rib corduroy are added, lending character to the winter look while maintaining impeccable sartorial construction.

%split%

Fits and models: solutions for every style

The FW25 collection proposes iconic models designed for different needs. The New York regular fit is available in wool, silk, cashmere, stretch denim and corduroy. The Torino slim fit uses gabardine, cotton or satin for an essential aesthetic. The Milano extra slim defines a sharp silhouette, while Osaka carrot fit and Chile cargo with two darts interpret an urban style. The line is completed by the Harris model in winter washes.

%split%

Garment dyeing and piece dyeing: artisanal uniqueness

Mason's trousers enhance two distinctive brand processes. Garment dyeing creates authentic and irregular nuances that make each model unique. Piece dyeing offers chromatic uniformity and enhances more structured fabrics. Both techniques add depth to color and highlight the quality of materials, giving the garments an unmistakable sartorial identity.

%split%

Why choose Mason's trousers

Technical, natural and premium fabrics designed to face winter

Calibrated fits: slim, regular, carrot, extra slim and relaxed

Sartorial design with refined details and sophisticated materials

Exclusive techniques such as garment dyeing and piece dyeing

%split%

What trousers are worn in winter?

For the cold season, trousers in corduroy, stretch gabardine, technical jersey, moleskin and wool blends, cashmere or silk fabrics are ideal. Fits like regular or carrot fit ensure comfort and protection while maintaining an elegant aesthetic. Warm and breathable materials allow you to face winter with a balance between functionality and style.

title: Man Winter Suits
description:
Mason's Men's Suits FW25

Why choose a Mason's suit

Sartorial processes such as garment dyeing and piece dyeing

title: Mason's Beachwear
description:
Mason’s Men’s Swimwear: Beachwear with Personality

Why choose Mason’s men’s swimwear?

 

 

Versilia Beach model: versatile in and out of the water

Lightweight technical polyester and quick-drying

Exclusive prints and summer colors

Tailored cut for every body type

Also perfect as a summer bermuda

title: Mason's Camouflage Icon
description:
Mason's Camouflage Icon: The Art of Camouflage in Contemporary Fashion

The Mason's Camouflage Icon line is a highlight of the Spring Summer 2025 collection, where the camouflage pattern is renewed with an urban and modern twist. This collection embodies the harmonious meeting between nature and metropolitan design, making each piece a versatile and distinctive choice for today’s man.

Innovation and Versatility

In the Mason's Camouflage Icon line, camouflage transforms, offering classic versions or enhanced with exotic details to adapt to different styles. The Chile 1 and Khinos M74 bermuda shorts perfectly represent this innovation, ideal for summer days. The Chile 1 cargo pants offer a more refined option, while the Print polos add a touch of originality. Even the Versilia Beach swimsuits interpret camouflage in an elegant and functional way, perfect for a sophisticated look on the beach.

The Mason's Camouflage Icon line celebrates the versatility of an iconic pattern, reinterpreted by Mason's with style and originality. Combining aesthetics, comfort, and a nod to nature, this Spring Summer 2025 collection is designed for the contemporary man who wishes to stand out with elegance and authenticity.

title: Mason's Flower Icon
description:
Mason's Flower Icon: An Ode to Summer Freedom

 

Discover the quintessence of summer style with the Mason's Flower Icon line. Designed for the Spring Summer 2024 season, this line is a true manifesto of the brand Mason's bold and colorful personality. It's a collection that speaks of freedom, joyful escapades, and a summer that seems to never end. The Mason's Flower Icon line is characterized by an explosion of vivid colors and captivating patterns. Each piece reflects a unique fusion of creativity and quality, with designs ranging from sophisticated floral prints to exotic tropical motifs. These elements combine to create clothing that not only captures attention but also tells a story of summer adventures and spontaneity.

 

Bermuda Shorts and Polo Shirts: The Essence of the Line

 

At the heart of the line, we find the men's bermuda shorts, represented by the Chile 1 and Eisenhower models. The Chile 1 model, with its canvas design and patterns that mix palms and exotic elements, offers a comfortable fit and a bold look. On the other hand, the Eisenhower bermuda shorts feature an elegant chino cut, embellished with a floral print that expresses a perfect balance between sophistication and carefreeness. The Print model Polo is another pillar of this collection. Often featuring patterns in tune with the bermuda shorts, this shirt embodies versatility, embracing both a casual and more refined style. It's ideal for creating a coordinated ensemble, adding a touch of class to every summer outfit.

 

The Mason's Flower Icon line is an invitation to live the summer with passion and style. Each piece is designed to enhance the personality and ensure comfort, allowing those who wear them to fully live every moment of the summer season. Join us on this journey of style and color in Spring Summer 2024.

title: Mason's Special / Wide Edition
description:
Mason's SS25 Men's Collection: Contemporary Elegance and Refined Comfort

 

 

The SS25 Men's Collection by Mason's is a tribute to historical tailoring, offering a modern and sophisticated reinterpretation of wide lines and relaxed silhouettes. The trousers and bermuda shorts in the Special / Wide Edition collection are designed for men seeking the perfect balance between comfort and refinement.

 

 

Crafted from exclusive fabrics like cotton-silk and cotton-hemp, these garments embody uncompromising quality. The cotton-silk offers a sensation of lightness and softness, while the cotton-hemp provides a unique texture, ideal for the summer season, ensuring freshness and breathability. The combination of these materials creates a feeling of discreet luxury reflected in every detail of the design.

 

 

The trousers and bermuda shorts in the collection feature a wide and contemporary silhouette, evoking the timeless elegance of traditional tailoring but with a modern and original twist. Each piece is designed for men who appreciate a distinctive and versatile style, adaptable to both formal settings and moments of relaxation.

 

 

The key pieces of this collection include the Cargo 22, the Pinces 22, and the Chinos 22, available as both trousers and bermuda shorts, perfect for facing warm days with style. Each piece boasts a wide and contemporary silhouette, echoing the timeless elegance of traditional tailoring but with a modern and original twist. The wide design of the Cargo 22 and Pinces 22 adds a touch of dynamism, while the Chinos 22 offer a cleaner and more versatile look, perfect for any occasion.

 

 

With clean lines and sophisticated details, the Mason's Special / Wide Edition embodies a discreet luxury aimed at those who value originality and artisanal quality. This collection invites you to embrace the spring-summer season with a look that not only celebrates traditional tailoring but also reinterprets the classic with a fresh and contemporary approach.

 

 

The SS25 Men's Collection by Mason's is designed for those who refuse to compromise between comfort and style, and who desire garments capable of telling a story of elegance and authenticity.

title: Mason's story
description:
Mason's Story Line: A Tribute to Iconic Cargos, Reimagined for Summer 2025

The Mason's Story line celebrates the extensive selection of men's cargo pants that trace the origins of the Mason's brand. Each piece is reimagined with a modern twist and tailored for the summer season, featuring significant updates in materials, details, and fit.

Among the main models of the collection, Mason's presents the cargo Chile 1 in stretch satin and cotton twill, characterized by a slim fit. Gabardine fabric takes center stage in the cargo Chile, offering a fresh yet sophisticated look; while a new addition includes the Flyshirt jackets in cotton and hemp, the FieldM74Jacket in cotton canvas oxford, and the James in stretch cotton chevron.

The Mason's Story line isn't limited to these models: each piece tells a story, blending tradition and innovation to offer a unique and versatile proposition. History and modernity coexist in this line, paying homage to Mason’s long-standing heritage with a contemporary touch.

title: Men Polos

Why choose Mason's polo shirts

A polo shirt is smart when it maintains balance between fabric, proportions and detail. In the Mason's SS26 Men's Polo Shirts collection, the compact piqué, the natural tones of the Terre del Mare line and the measured distinctive details transform a casual piece into a refined proposition. title: Men Summer Bermuda Shorts
description:

Why choose Mason's bermuda shorts

  • Wide and distinctive colour palette, from vibrant to classic
  • Selected summer materials and refined constructions

title: Men Summer Jackets
description:
Men's Jackets Mason's Spring Summer 2026

The men's jackets Spring Summer 2026 collection is rooted in the history of the Field Jacket, born as a military garment and now an icon of the male wardrobe. Mason's lightens its constructions and redefines its proportions for the spring season. The work jackets and field jackets SS26 preserve the utility spirit in a contemporary and versatile key.

Lightweight fabric and functional soul

The Terre del Mare line evokes the light and landscapes of the Mediterranean with a natural, material-rich palette. The range is completed by Work Jackets in denim and canvas and the City Jacket Summer in cotton and linen, ideal for the transitional season.

Why choose a Mason's jacket

  • Iconic field jacket reinterpreted for spring
  • Prevalence of cotton and lightweight natural fabrics
  • Functional details such as the extractable hood
  • Balance between utility spirit and tailored construction

What jacket should you wear in spring?

In spring, the choice falls on light and versatile jackets, preferably in cotton, capable of adapting to changing temperatures. Field jackets and work jackets represent an ideal solution thanks to their functional yet not heavy structure. The Mason's SS26 Men's Jackets collection interprets the transitional season with practical, balanced and contemporary pieces.

title: Men Summer Pants
description:
Men's Trousers Mason's Spring Summer 2026

The men's trousers Spring Summer 2026 collection interprets the summer season with pieces designed to deliver comfort, lightness and a measured tailoring. The SS26 trousers combine selected summer materials and clean constructions, accompanying the contemporary man through everyday and formal settings. A proposal consistent with the Mason's identity, balancing functionality with timeless elegance.

The SS26 reinterprets iconic Mason's models with a cleaner aesthetic. Why choose Mason's trousers

  • Calibrated fits: slim, regular, carrot and extra slim
  • Tailored construction and attention to detail

title: Men Winter Blazers
description:
Mason's Men's Blazers FW25

The Mason's men's blazer collection FW25 interprets the jacket as a hybrid garment capable of combining formality and functionality. Sartorial lines blend with technical materials designed for urban rhythms, creating blazers that integrate everyday comfort, Italian elegance and textile innovation. The Da Vinci model comes in variants designed for different needs: corduroy for a warm and enveloping effect, stretch gabardine for dynamic elegance, Active 4.0 jersey for elasticity and wrinkle resistance, and stretch jersey to combine practicality and style. Material interpretations and style

Alongside the Da Vinci variants, the Steve overshirt in corduroy proposes a more informal interpretation of the blazer, while the Roma in wool evokes classic and rigorous elegance. Distinctive models: Da Vinci, Steve and Roma

Why choose a Mason's blazer

Premium and innovative fabrics to face winter

Iconic models capable of adapting to different contexts

Synthesis between sartorial elegance and everyday functionality

Pairing versatility with Mason's chinos, cargo pants and denim

The Mason's men's blazer FW25 accompanies every moment of the day: with shirt and chinos at the office, with cargo pants for an urban look, or over knitwear and denim in leisure time. title: Men Winter Cargo Pants
description:
Mason's Men's Cargo Trousers FW25

Mason's men's cargo trousers return as protagonists in FW25, reinterpreting military inspiration with a contemporary language. Functional yet refined, they combine sartorial design, structured comfort and urban attitude, adapting naturally to the rhythm of modern life.

Technical materials and exclusive treatments

Mason's cargo trousers are designed with careful construction that combines structure, durability and style. Functional cargo pockets, ergonomic stitching and inserts designed to accompany movement transform utility aesthetics into an evolved urban expression, practical and refined.

Why choose Mason's cargo trousers

Personalized fits: extra slim, regular and relaxed

Performance materials: gabardine, corduroy, bull, wool and jersey

Ideal for work, leisure and urban outdoor

Functional design with practical cargo pockets and contemporary aesthetic

In winter, Mason's cargo trousers lend themselves to multiple interpretations: with slim shirt and sartorial blazer for a city look, or with field jacket and heavy knitwear for a more casual and outdoor attitude. title: Men Winter Cargo Pants
description:
Mason's Men's Chino Trousers FW25

Designed to accompany men throughout every moment of the day, Mason's chinos stand out for material quality, construction precision and a refined yet current style.

Materials and innovation

FW25 offers chinos made from premium fabrics and advanced technical fibers. Alongside wool and cashmere, there's room for ribbed corduroy and Active 4.0 jersey, protagonist of the Travel & Dynamic line. A material designed to guarantee elasticity, breathability and durability, ideal for facing daily life with style and freedom of movement.

Models and fits: tailored elegance

Why choose Mason's chino trousers

Premium materials and technical fabrics designed for winter

Diversified fits for every style and body type

Travel & Dynamic line for everyday comfort and performance

Sartorial processes and contemporary details

What are chino trousers?

title: Men Winter Denim
description:
Mason's Men's Jeans FW25

The Autumn Winter 2025 Mason's collection celebrates men's denim by reinterpreting the classic 5-pocket trouser with a modern and sartorial language. Updated fits, performance materials and distinctive details create a proposal designed to face winter with style and character.

The protagonist of the collection is the iconic Harris, 5-pocket jeans available in regular and slim fit, offered in three blue washes, from the most intense to the lightest. Made from denim with memory elastane, it maintains its shape over time and guarantees a stable and comfortable fit, even after frequent use.

%split%

Sartorial details: the value of discreet luxury

Enriching Mason's FW25 denim are details of measured luxury: the silk handkerchief coordinated with selvedge and inner leg, the enameled button and the iconic M rivet logo. Elements that make each jean recognizable and consistent with the brand's sartorial identity.

%split%

Alongside the Harris, the collection introduces the New York in stretch denim, offered in regular fit. Available in the Time version with 1 dart and in the new variant with 2 darts, it brings the language of jeans towards a more sartorial dimension, without sacrificing comfort.

%split%

Why choose Mason's denim

Modern and comfortable fits

Stretch and durable materials

Iconic details and artisanal care

Style versatility, from casual to sophisticated

%split%

What does denim trouser mean?

A denim trouser is made from jean fabric, a durable cotton generally dyed in indigo and characterized by a diagonal weave. In Mason's vision, denim becomes a noble fabric, reinterpreted elegantly through refined washes and sartorial details that enhance its personality and style.

title: Men Winter Jogger Pants
description:

title: Perfumes Mason's
description:
Beauty: body fragrances and body solutions

Craft production of luxury products of highest quality. Mason’s Beauty, a sensual voyage that nurtures the body and the spirit, a collection of three smell emotions available in a body line, for him and for her. The base fragrance, Black Camou, symbolizes the voyager on his search for vibrations. Exaltation of fresh male notes and warm female notes. Green Camou, for him, is the essence that materializes phenomena lying deep into one's memory, a devoted companion along the way. An oriental fragrance that guides our olfactory sense by disentangling it into incense and patchouli, Nepali woods and amber. White Camou, for her, is a crispy breath, the start of a new adventure. Female energy expressing itself in all aspects embracing the notes of iris and rose, of lime and cedar wood. The body line is a natural infusion for the skin, as an undeletable stamp, and the evocation of the base fragrance, Black Camou, is the metaphor for the personal journey of every individual.

title: TRAVEL & DYNAMIC
description:
Travel & Dynamic: Innovation and Comfort in Mason's Collection

The Travel & Dynamic line by Mason’s revolutionizes the concept of everyday technical apparel by introducing advanced fabrics in cotton and Tencel. These state-of-the-art materials, up to 50% thinner than traditional cotton, combine the properties of activewear with the elegance of a garment for everyday wear.

The Travel & Dynamic fabrics stand out for their breathability, elasticity, quick-drying properties, and the convenience of being wrinkle-resistant. Ideal for those leading an intense life, they offer exceptional comfort without sacrificing style.

Versatility and Elegance: From Blazers to Pants

Mason's applies these innovations to garments such as the Da Vinci Tech Dynamic and Da Vinci Travel, which embody modern elegance. Perfect for sophisticated looks, they pair seamlessly with chino pants like the Milano Style Dynamic, creating contemporary and functional outfits. The Williams stretch satin tech-travel overshirts also fit into this line, enriching the collection with versatile and trendy options.

The Milano Jogger, Milano Jogger Travel, Chile Jogger, Milano Style Dynamic and Torino Style, chino jogger pants represent another expression of this fusion between technology and style. With the new introduction of wool, the Travel & Dynamic garments offer a comfortable and elegant solution for everyday life.

The Travel & Dynamic line by Mason’s elegantly and functionally responds to the needs of modern living, demonstrating that it is possible to wear technical garments that meet the demands of a dynamic life without compromising on style.

title: Travel & Dynamic: Lightweight and High Tech Men's Pants
description:
Travel & Dynamic Technical Fabrics: Lightweight and Comfort for Men's Pants

 

The lightweight men's pants from Mason's line boast the use of innovative technical fabrics, such as Travel & Dynamic. These fabrics, made with a combination of nylon and cotton, represent the latest generation of special materials for clothing. Characterized by a thin and light weave, they offer numerous advantages over traditional cotton. Their lightness allows superior comfort, with a weight reduced by up to 50% compared to standard cotton pants. This means that Mason's lightweight men's pants are ideal for those who want to wear comfortable and practical garments in everyday life.

 

Sophisticated Design and Technology: the Lightweight Men's Pants from Mason's Line

 

Mason's men's suits, made with Travel & Dynamic technical fabrics, combine elegant style with the features of performance wear. These fabrics are designed to be like a second skin, offering exceptional comfort thanks to their breathability and quick-drying ability.

 

Moreover, Mason's lightweight men's pants in Travel & Dynamic do not need to be ironed, making them even more practical for those with a hectic life. The Mason's line offers various options of lightweight men's pants, such as the Chile Jogger cargo model in travel jersey and the Milano Jogger chino in active jersey. Also available are the Harris pants in dynamic denim with 5 pockets and the Tech Jacket and New Verga outerwear in technical jersey. These garments represent a perfect blend of urban style and technical-sportswear, suitable for all occasions of the day.

 

With these lightweight men's pants from Mason's Travel & Dynamic line, fashion meets the needs of the modern world. They are the ideal option for those looking for trendy garments, with a perfect fit and high-performance fabrics, but without sacrificing tailoring quality. Whether you have an active lifestyle or simply want to wear comfortable and quality garments, the men's pants from the Travel & Dynamic line represent the ideal choice. Tailoring, technology, and practicality in full Mason's style.
